text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year. Let's work hard this year.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Or, rather, let's work harder this year? Since I'm
competing in harder races.
choice_data_list: We've got the Classic Triple Crown ahead.
We've got the Classic Triple Crown ahead.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yup. This is the path I chose for myself...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is the pinnacle of the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I can do well there, I'll be able to show people
who I really am.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I have to make up for the disappointment I
caused...

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
What?! City isn't gonna be running in the Tiara
tour?

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
Man, I was really hoping to see her win the Triple
Tiara...

At the end of last year, Gold City announced that
she would compete in the Classic Triple Crown
tour—but some fans were disappointed by this
turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Some of them even complained to my modeling
agency. I got an angry call about it from my
manager.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She gave me an earful about how the Tiara makes
more sense for a model, saying she'd already set
up work for me based on it. Hell of a way to start
the year.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So of course I pushed back—I was like, "Shut up
and watch me!" Then I hung up.
choice_data_list: We'll win Big M over with your running!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, sure, but what did you just call my
manager?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh. Anyway...
Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: City! Happy New Year!

We find ourselves joined by Yukino Bijin—a
fellow student who seems to look up to Gold
City. City's told me about her a few times in the
past.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yukino? Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I heard you were on campus, so I had t'come see
you... Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you... Weren't you planning to go home for
the holiday?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yup! And I'm back already, with souvenirs too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Really? I hope you brought those yummy cookies
again like last time.

I notice Gold City's expression ease after Yukino
Bijin arrives. She has a soft spot for those who
adore her.

I always worry about how uptight Gold City can
be, so this might be a good opportunity for her to
unwind for once.
choice_data_list: Why don't you two hang out for a bit?
You two go and enjoy the snacks together.
Is there anything you want to do, Yukino Bijin?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? But... haven't we got traini—

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh gosh, really?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go check out the lucky bags with City! I
can't ev'r figure out which one t'choose myself.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh—but I'd probably be gett'n in the way mak'n
City hang out with me, wouldn't I?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
If you're busy, I'll just go mind my business
elsewhere!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer says it's fine, so let's go.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Holy smokes! Thanks a jillion, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but my hair's all a mess. I can't go out with
City look'n like this!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gimme a sec to go get ready!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Gosh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You and your suggestions.

Yukino Bijin tells me later that Gold City let her
do whatever she wanted and was "so kind and
cool" the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yippee! I'll bring the souvenirs over here,
then!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I bought lots and lots, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I want both of you to try these Morioka
specialties! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What are you looking at me for? If Yukino says
it's fine, then it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? City, you did ask for two boxes worth, right?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I thought the idea was to eat 'em with Trainer
from the start.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, did I? I guess I was planning it as a way to say
thanks or something.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well then, I'll go make some tea.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! N-no, I can't make ya go through the
trouble alone! Wait for me, City!

So the three of us enjoy a relaxing time together,
eating the souvenirs Yukino brought while
listening to her stories from back home.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah, right now?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Well, my mom gave me some bath minerals, so I was think'n of try'n those out...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Bath minerals? What are those?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
They're these crystals you find in hot springs.
When you dissolve 'em, it releases all the good
stuff inside—it's like hav'n a hot spring at home!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I think I've seen them before. Cool, cool. Are
they a specialty of Morioka too?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Not ev'n a bit, hehe. My mom bought too many
online, so she gave some to me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya say, City? You'll have to come to the
Miho dorm if you wanna try 'em though!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
They don't damage the tub, so the dorm leader
gave me permission to use 'em so long's I clean up
after.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I see. That sounds nice...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I dunno. I do have training today...
choice_data_list: Today is just a strategy meeting. Go ahead.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, guess I'm taking a bath then.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Hot springs with City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, these are bath minerals? Looks kind of
suspicious...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: It's fine! We just put 'em in a pack like this...

Later, Gold City returns to my office looking
totally relaxed.
